_comment: DRIFT CANARY (Phase F P2.4) — informational snapshot of empirical Copilot+Claude-Code wire shape as of 2026-05-11. NOT a regression gate. Future contributors: when this diff updates (Claude Code adds a beta, Copilot accepts/rejects something new), update this snapshot manually after verifying the policy contract test still passes. The contract test in tests/integration/claude-policy.test.ts is the regression gate — this canary just makes the wire-shape diff visible during code review.

anthropic_beta_responses.prompt-caching-scope-2026-01-05: 200 ACCEPTED — header alone OK even with body cache_control.scope stripped
anthropic_beta_responses.web-search-2025-03-05: 200 ACCEPTED (router extended; tool-use intercepted via /search MCP)
anthropic_beta_responses.summarize-connector-text-2026-03-13: 200 ACCEPTED (router extended; Anthropic-internal flag, won't fire for non-ant users)
anthropic_beta_responses.oauth-2025-04-20: 200 ACCEPTED (router extended; Files-API path; Files-API itself 404'd)
anthropic_beta_responses.advisor-tool-2026-03-01: 400 'unsupported beta header(s): advisor-tool-2026-03-01' — STRIPPED by router (Phase A EXPLICITLY_STRIPPED_BETA_PREFIXES). Phase I plan: implement proxy-side ADVISOR translate.
anthropic_beta_responses.context-1m-2025-08-07: 400 'unsupported beta header' — NOT in router allowlist (1M context unlocked via model slug claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal)
anthropic_beta_responses.skills-2025-10-02: 400 'unsupported beta header' — NOT in router allowlist
anthropic_beta_responses.files-api-2025-04-14: 400 'unsupported beta header' — NOT in router allowlist (also: Files API endpoint itself returns 404)
anthropic_beta_responses.code-execution-2025-05-22: 400 'unsupported beta header' — NOT in router allowlist
anthropic_beta_responses.output-128k-2025-02-19: 400 'unsupported beta header' — NOT in router allowlist

body_field_responses.budget: 400 'budget: Extra inputs are not permitted' — STRIPPED by router (Phase B)
body_field_responses.output_config.schema: 400 'output_config.schema: Extra inputs are not permitted' — STRIPPED (preserves output_config.effort sibling)
body_field_responses.betas: 400 'betas: Extra inputs are not permitted' — STRIPPED (anthropic-beta header conveys the same info)
body_field_responses.mcp_servers: 400 'mcp_servers: Extra inputs are not permitted' — NOT stripped (Phase G translate-path planned; silent strip would cause LLM to hallucinate tools)

claude_code_only_request_headers._comment: All 7 returned 200 individually + combined. Copilot ignores them. The router currently does NOT explicitly forward arbitrary headers to Copilot — only specific ones it adds (Authorization, anthropic-beta, anthropic-version, openai-intent, copilot-* identity, etc.). So these are 'cosmetic hygiene' candidates only; demoted from P0.3 to P2.1.
claude_code_only_request_headers.x-anthropic-additional-protection: 200 IGNORED (env-stripped via CLAUDE_CODE_ADDITIONAL_PROTECTION; if it leaks through, Copilot still 200s)

model_resolution._comment: Behavior of resolveModel cascade against the catalog above.
model_resolution.claude-opus-4-7 (Anthropic dashed): → claude-opus-4.7-1m-internal (family preference picks 1M variant matching version)
model_resolution.claude-3-7-sonnet-20250219 (legacy Sonne: → claude-sonnet-4.6 (Phase A P0.4 Step 6 legacy fallback). Was: Copilot 400 'model not supported'.
model_resolution.claude-sonnet-4-0 (legacy Sonnet 4.0): → claude-sonnet-4.6 (Phase A P0.4 Step 6 legacy fallback). Was: Copilot 400.
model_resolution.claude-3-5-haiku-20241022 (legacy Haiku: Native Copilot acceptance — request reaches Copilot as-is and Bedrock-aliases to claude-haiku-4-5-20251001

leverage_features_status.task_budgets: ENABLED via header (Phase A allowlist); body field stripped (Phase B). Header-only conveyance; cost ceiling NOT enforced server-side. Estimated user impact: 100% of --max-budget-usd users now get the request to succeed (was 100% failure).
leverage_features_status.token_efficient_tools: ENABLED via header. Estimated cost saving: ~5-15% on tool-heavy sessions per Anthropic's own ~14% reduction figure.
leverage_features_status.structured_outputs: PARTIAL — header allowlisted, body schema stripped. Schema enforcement happens client-side in Claude Code; without server-side enforcement, JSON validation may fail more often. User-visible: same 'invalid JSON' errors users would see on real Anthropic when schema doesn't match — but no automatic retry.
leverage_features_status.advisor: DISABLED — Copilot 400s on the beta header. Stripped server-side. Phase I plan: implement proxy-side ADVISOR translate (intercept tool_use{name:'__anthropic_advisor'}, route to configurable advisor model — default cross-lab via gpt-5.5 or gemini-3.1-pro for true 'second set of eyes').
leverage_features_status.agent_team: ENABLED — TeamCreate/TeamDelete tool definitions and tool_use/tool_result blocks pass through unmodified (verified by Phase F policy test). The peer-review-coordinator subagent is auto-injected on every team via existing peer-MCP plumbing.
leverage_features_status.goals: ENABLED — Goal tracking is purely client-side (Stop-hook driven in Claude Code). The proxy doesn't intercept hooks.
leverage_features_status.files_api: DISABLED — Copilot has no equivalent storage backend. /v1/files/* returns explicit 404 with 'use Anthropic API directly' message (Phase E P1.4).
leverage_features_status.bridge_remote_sessions: DISABLED — CLAUDE_BRIDGE_*, CLAUDE_CODE_REMOTE, etc. stripped from spawned-child env (Phase A P1.3) so the remote-session code path never activates.
leverage_features_status.telemetry: DISABLED — DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 + DISABLE_NON_ESSENTIAL_MODEL_CALLS=1 + CLAUDE_CODE_DISABLE_NONESSENTIAL_TRAFFIC=1 set by getClaudeCodeEnvVars (Phase A P1.2).
